purpose: Bind exact base-negative and solution-positive controls for the four scope-review semantic survivors without running either candidate agent.
terminal_status_note: This artifact settles reproducible-within-budget for the four listed candidates and routes them only to selected-for-task-authoring. It is not final task wording, final protected-evaluator approval, a pilot manifest, or candidate-agent execution authorization.

local_environment_snapshot.materialization: Ephemeral detached exact-base and exact-solution worktrees were created from locally cached bare repositories. Protected screening evaluators were stored outside each checkout, copied in only for the control command, and were not committed.

dependency_installs.command: npm ci --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund with an isolated temporary npm cache
npm ci --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund with an isolated temporary npm cache
npm ci --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund with an isolated temporary npm cache

control_policy: Use byte-identical protected evaluator content for the exact base and exact solution of each candidate.
Require the exact base to fail for a task-relevant reason and the exact solution to pass.
Run a repository-owned health seam on both revisions when practical; symmetric pre-existing health failures are recorded and cannot count as solution evidence.
Use only offline, non-destructive controls with no candidate agent, secret, push, publish, or production action.
A screening evaluator proves an authorable seam, not final evaluator validity. Final authoring must independently inspect shortcut resistance and behavioral coverage.

base_control.observation: FAIL 10/10 because the source-derived versioning, stability-tier, changelog, and public-language policy clauses are absent.

screening_evaluator.kind: protected Jest and React Testing Library behavior evaluator

base_control.observation: The shared English label export is absent and the Korean Daily link remains localized.

solution_control.observation: Two fixed-label behavior tests passed under the Korean locale.

screening_evaluator.kind: protected Jest and React Testing Library interaction evaluator

base_control.observation: The Information modal exposes only three buttons rather than the source-required fourth Patch Notes tab.

solution_control.observation: The modal exposes Patch Notes and expands the reused v1.4.0 entry.

screening_evaluator.kind: protected Jest, React Test Renderer, mocked API, and structural rollback screening evaluator
screening_evaluator.authoring_requirement: Replace the rollback structural assertion with a behavioral failure-and-restore control before final protected-evaluator approval.

base_control.observation: The destination memo editor module is absent at the exact base.

solution_control.observation: Four controls passed for mapper/store behavior, editor normalization, mocked API normalization, rollback structure, and preview exposure.

repository_health_control.preparation: Generated ignored API and Kakao config stubs with an empty environment and repository-owned sync scripts because install scripts were deliberately disabled.
repository_health_control.observation: Both exact revisions fail during collection because RNCWebViewModule is unavailable in the host Node/Jest environment. This pre-existing native-module limitation is not counted as solution evidence; the isolated protected seam mocks unrelated native dependencies.

integrity.tracked_worktree_status_after_controls: clean for all eight exact worktrees when untracked protected evaluator copies and ignored dependency/config material are excluded

invariants: The same evaluator bytes produced each base-negative and solution-positive pair.
All four evaluators complete far below the preregistered per-task budget.
No symmetric repository-health failure was used as evidence of task success.
Selection here means selected-for-task-authoring only; final task wording, evaluator validity review, leakage audit, and pilot-manifest construction remain pending.
